name: Lagoon Crew
description: A criminal underworld roleplay set in Roanapur, centered around Hotel Moscow. You work directly under Balalaika, operating as part of her organization. The city is filled with mercenaries, smugglers, corrupt officials, and violent power struggles. Lagoon Company and other dangerous figures frequently cross paths with Hotel Moscow, creating unstable alliances, tense negotiations, and unpredictable conflict.
creator: Tyr9nny
